## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to improve conversion rate optimization (CRO) on blog to generate more leads and signups from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Implementing lead magnets, conversion panels, and exit-intent popups on blog posts can significantly boost conversions](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Backlink strategy should be developed in parallel with CRO efforts to improve search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Revamp of Arena's blog and website CTA strategy is in progress to increase conversions](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Progress

  - [New record for clicks this week, though impressions dipped slightly](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [700 visits in last few months went to 404 pages; redirects being implemented](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [123 new articles published, generating 120-123 weekly visits](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [45 content refreshes done, generating \~40 weekly visits](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Total weekly organic traffic around 160-200 visits](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Strategy

  - [Current blog sidebar CTAs (book demo, talk to sales) not converting well](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Add conversion panels within article content (2-3 times per post)](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Implement exit-intent popups](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Create lead magnets like case studies, ebooks, free credits](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
      - [Test irresistible offers (e.g. 3 months free) to validate traffic quality](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Arena team working on CRO campaign with new banners across site](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Slow down publishing new content, focus on optimizing existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Prioritize adding lead magnets and conversion elements to top-performing posts](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Organize content by funnel stage (top, middle, bottom) to align CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Ensure 3-4 internal links per article for better interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### Backlink Strategy Development

  - [Start outreach to gain quality backlinks, improving domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Target content managers at relevant companies for backlink exchanges](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
  - [Use outbound email campaigns to scale backlink outreach efforts](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [Consider some paid placements on high-authority sites](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)

### Visitor Identification and Lead Nurturing

  - [Implement Rev2B to identify company/visitor data from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [Use identified leads for targeted outbound campaigns and LinkedIn networking](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=3644.0)
  - [Create multi-channel nurture flows (blog \> email \> LinkedIn) for identified leads](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Arena to implement new CTAs and conversion elements on blog this week](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [GrowthX to organize content by funnel stage in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Arena to explore Hayreach for LinkedIn lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=3896.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to dive deeper into CRO tactics and backlink strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [GrowthX to share more details on backlink outreach process and templates](https://fathom.video/share/mbzKwJPE8CuMaihRmGnmbc9sagUWTxti?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
